title: Automatically assign approver in Approval App
excerpt: Is there a way to automatically assign the approver when using the Approvals app? I’d like to trigger the assignment of the person based on  another status change in the pulse. It’s seems a bit clumsy to have to manually…

posts.author: PhillAllen (Phill Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to automatically assign the approver when using the Approvals app? I’d like to trigger the assignment of the person based on another status change in the pulse. It’s seems a bit clumsy to have to manually assign the approver.

posts.author: Camisz91 (Camilla Souza)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @PhillAllen, Did you find a solution for this? Same problem here…

posts.author: PhillAllen (Phill Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately no response and no solution that I could find.
